      "Trusting a single weather forecast — multiple sources give different predictions above 5,000 m",
      "Pushing to a single carry to C4 too early — it works but costs you badly"
    ],

      "Walk at night on the lower glacier to reduce crevasse risk — rangers give this advice at BC",
      "Build high snow walls at every camp — wind can destroy tents even in good weather",
      "Salami, cheese, and real food at C4 is a major morale boost among freeze-dried rations",
      "Cache your food and gear securely above the ridge — cut deep into ice if possible",
      "Do not rush your summit window decision — a rest day now beats a failed summit attempt",
      "Leave C5 before 10am on summit day — the climb is long and the cold is relentless after dark"
